channel.title: volunteering on 🚴‍♀️ Stefanni Brasil
channel.description: Recent content in volunteering on 🚴‍♀️ Stefanni Brasil

item.title: ActivateYYC: Making an intersection better for people
item.description: It’s not every day that I get to paint the pavement on a street! Read along, or watch the video to learn more about my first opportunity to work on a hands-on community focused project here in Calgary. Have you ever used the intersection at Center Street S and 13th Ave SW? Then, you probably noticed it was built for cars. With four surface parking lots catering to suburban commuters, “free” street parking, and large roads, this is a dangerous intersection for all road users, even for motorists.
